summary: Content-Type changed to text/event-stream (SSE). EventStream tab appears in DevTools but shows NO events. tRPC mutation #5 still rejected. Warning NOT displayed in chat.

details.root_cause: Content-Type header correctly changed to text/event-stream, but SSE body format is invalid. DevTools EventStream tab shows 0 parsed events, meaning the response body lacks proper SSE formatting (data: prefix and \n\n delimiters). The tRPC httpBatchStreamLink parser cannot decode the stream.

findings.progress_vs_433: Content-Type fixed from application/json to text/event-stream
findings.remaining_issue: SSE body format - events must use standard SSE wire format: 'data: {json}\n\n' for each event in the started→data→stopped sequence

services.recommendation: Fix APF SSE body format: each tRPC event must be prefixed with 'data: ' and terminated with '\n\n'. Three events needed in sequence: started, data (with warning payload), stopped. Current body likely sends raw JSON without SSE framing.
